extraction.one_line_summary: GILBERT Philippe won a crosswind-shattered stage after QUINTANA Nairo's ASTANA split forced ROGLIČ Primož to chase for 40km, limiting losses to just 5 seconds.
tactical_patterns: ASTANA echeloned stage at 40km out, installing QUINTANA in virtual red; MOVISTAR stopped working, limiting their gains.
Sun Web placed four riders in split then dropped JAKOBSEN Fabio before climbs, prioritizing PEDERSEN Casper GC ambitions.
UAE sacrificed MOLANO Juan Sebastián's sprint to chase for POGAČAR, revealing team hierarchy favors GC over stage hunting.
BENNETT Sam went 300m early anticipating chaos; GILBERT waited on wheel demonstrating superior tactical patience in disorganized finishes.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Astana's echelon at 40km nearly stole red jersey, conceding only 5s after forcing elite chase
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Isolated without teammates in crosswind split, required 40km chase to defend red by 5 seconds
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Made critical 30-rider split despite starting in fourth GC, showing emerging classics skills
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Rebounded from worst mountain day to make elite echelon, then chased for LÓPEZ at finish
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: Dropped deliberately by own Sun Web teammates prioritizing PEDERSEN's GC, then mechanical compounded losses
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: positive: Won from disorganized sprint by waiting on BENNETT's wheel until 100m, superior timing negated early move
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Launched 300m sprint from chaos but cracked, revealing inability to sustain power in ultra-long efforts
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Casper: positive: Sun Web placed him in elite 32-rider split with four teammates, treating as GC asset not domestique
rider_signals.KNOX James: positive: Finished 10th in reduced sprint after making crosswind split, punching above perceived climbing specialist role
